summary: Refactored the qd report checker into a small entrypoint plus sourced helper files for common, completion, audit, and roadmap export validations while preserving existing validation behavior.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: just qd-reports-check still uses scripts/qd-reports-check.sh as the entrypoint.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: justfile still invokes bash scripts/qd-reports-check.sh for the qd-reports-check recipe, and evidence/m4-qd-report-checker-modularization/qd-reports-check.log records that command passing.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Existing report, run, finding, path, commit, and coverage validations still run and current repo state passes.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: The sourced helper files preserve the existing validation functions by domain; evidence/m4-qd-report-checker-modularization/qd-reports-check.log records the current repository passing.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Split checker logic into clear sourced helper files; every hand-written checker source file must be under 500 lines.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: scripts/qd-reports-check.sh sources scripts/qd-report-check/common.sh, completion.sh, audit.sh, and roadmap.sh. evidence/m4-qd-report-checker-modularization/line-count-check.log records each checker source file below 500 lines.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Record qd-reports-check, just-check, line-count, git-diff-check, and negative-smoke evidence under the node evidence directory.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: evidence/m4-qd-report-checker-modularization contains qd-reports-check.log, just-check.log, line-count-check.log, git-diff-check.log, and negative-smoke-unknown-run-kind.log.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Add reports/qd/m4-qd-report-checker-modularization/completion.json and audit.json with matching nodeId and leave commits[] empty until after merge unless qd tooling requires otherwise.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: This completion report and reports/qd/m4-qd-report-checker-modularization/audit.json both use nodeId=m4-qd-report-checker-modularization; commits[] is empty.

commandsRun.command: temporary-copy unknown runs[].kind smoke through QD_REPORTS_ROADMAP_EXPORT

realWorldValidation.evidence: Repository qd metadata validation only; no product runtime, platform, capture, transport, decode, render, presentation, cross-device, or latency behavior is claimed.
